content:
✅ Both documentation files have been created successfully:

## FILE 1: `D:\AI-Business\docs\AGENT_HANDOFF.md`
Comprehensive agent handoff document covering all 10 requested sections:
1. **Purpose** — Explains this doc is for AI agents taking over
2. **System State Checklist** — 10-item table + full PowerShell validation script (ComfyUI, Ollama, GPU, disk, dirs, locks)
3. **How to Read Logs** — Log file table, format spec, severity levels, PowerShell grep queries
4. **How to Run Diagnostics** — Full Python diagnostic script, curl commands, GPU monitoring
5. **Key File Locations** — Detailed table with scripts, configs, workflows, models, outputs, logs, templates
6. **API Endpoints** — ComfyUI (POST /prompt, GET /history, GET /view, POST /upload, WebSocket with Python example) and Ollama (POST /api/generate, POST /api/chat, GET /api/tags) with full JSON request/response examples
7. **Error Recovery Procedures** — ComfyUI crash, OOM, partial generation, corrupt output, Ollama failures — each with PowerShell/Python recovery scripts
8. **Health Checks** — Quick (one-liner) and full health check PowerShell scripts + cross-platform curl commands
9. **Common Failure Modes and Fixes** — 14-row table covering all major failure scenarios
10. **Resumption Protocol** — 10-step procedure for agents to pick up work

## FILE 2: `D:\AI-Business\docs\ARCHITECTURE.md`
Full technical architecture document covering all 10 requested sections:
1. **System Overview** — Platform description, product types, tech stack
2. **Component Diagram** — ASCII art showing Orchestrator, ComfyUI, Ollama, Post-Processing, PDF Assembler, Listing Writer, Niche Research, and File System with dependency table
3. **Data Flow** — ASCII flow diagram + 7-step detailed description of the full pipeline
4. **API Contracts** — ComfyUI REST (POST /prompt, GET /history, GET /view, WebSocket with all message types, GET /system_stats, GET /queue) and Ollama (POST /api/generate, POST /api/chat, GET /api/tags, POST /api/pull) — all with full JSON examples
5. **File Naming Conventions** — Images, PDFs, Listings, Batch IDs with format specs and examples
6. **Output Formats and Specs** — KDP PDF (8.5×11, 300DPI, margins, bleed, cover spine formula), Etsy Wall Art (9 size variants table), mockup specs
7. **Model Specifications** — Tables for SD checkpoints (4 models), LoRA adapters (3), VAE models (2), Ollama LLMs (3) — all with settings
8. **LoRA Details** — ColoringBook.Redmond deep dive: trigger words, weight ranges, prompt templates, ComfyUI node JSON, Civitai source
9. **Pipeline Stages** — 6 stages each with detailed process steps, error handling, and retry logic; listing output JSON schema
10. **Concurrency Model** — Semaphore-based scheduling, overlap strategy diagram, batch processing flow, state persistence with JSON schema
